g.title: vandelay.session_tracker:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.session_tracker:workstation->actor.workstation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (workstation) REFERENCES actor.workstation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
